global_rules.language: Hinglish (mix of Hindi and English) for UI labels and headings to ensure cultural alignment and user comfort.
global_rules.density: High density for data, but grouped logically with borders. Executive/BCG report feel.
global_rules.alignment: Left-aligned for paragraphs, tables, and form inputs. Numbers right-aligned in tables.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Grid items must be direct children.
spacing_and_layout.surface_treatment: Grid Borders strategy. Use border-collapse styles or items with subtle border-r border-b. Flat solid surfaces, NO glassmorphism.
spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: Use generous internal padding in major sections (p-8), tight in data widgets (p-4).

components.navigation: Top summary band with primary navigation or Left-side detail rail. Must include Logo area, Visit Selector, and PDF Export CTA.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Must override default height to h-auto. Use for switching between the 8 segments.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px solid border (border-border), rounded-none or rounded-sm max. No shadows. Use for per-segment KPIs.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Dense styling. 1px border. Zebra striping or subtle hover row (hover:bg-muted).
components.forms: Shadcn Form primitives. Inputs must have clear 1px borders, square or 4px radius. Left-aligned labels.
components.charts: Recharts wrapped in Shadcn Chart. Use monochrome and primary accent (Red/Black/Grey) for bars and lines.
components.ai_insight_panel: Narrative insight panel. Background: #FEF2F2 (Very light red) to distinguish AI content. Include an AI icon.
components.buttons: Square or rounded-sm. Primary CTA in B91C1C (Crimson), secondary in Outline.

motion.page_transitions: Fade in. No complex staggering for enterprise data to ensure perceived performance.

image_urls.description: Piles of newspapers. Use as a subtle, low-opacity background for the visit selector page or login.
Corporate meeting. Use as an accent image in the Executive Summary PDF header or dashboard header.

testing_requirements.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based format (e.g., 'submit-visit-btn', 'segment-tab-circulation', 'ai-insight-text').

specific_segment_instructions.segment_1: Branch Head: Focus on revenue vs target comparison.
specific_segment_instructions.segment_2: Circulation: Highlight top 5 weak agents in a high-contrast table.
specific_segment_instructions.segment_3: Agent Feedback: Dynamic entry forms for commitments.
specific_segment_instructions.segment_4: Hawker Feedback: Form fields with Hinglish labels.
specific_segment_instructions.segment_6: Ad Team: Revenue charts and lost client table.
specific_segment_instructions.segment_8: Recovery: Ageing table (30/60/90 days) with red highlighting for >90 days.
specific_segment_instructions.dashboard_summary: Top 5 issues/opportunities side-by-side. Executive summary narrative spanning full width.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Lucide-React for all icons. Follow the strict Swiss & High-Contrast archetype. Do NOT use gradients or soft shadows. Stick to sharp, 1px borders and flat colors. The app is hybrid data-entry + dashboard. Ensure all 8 segments have tabs in the UI. Use Hinglish strictly for labels. Make sure the data input forms and dashboard views can toggle or are laid out clearly. IMPORTANT: Write guidelines for .js files, NOT .tsx files. Use standard React with JS and prop-types or purely JS.
